## Summary

- what changed
- why it changed

## Validation

- [ ] `./gradlew clean check testJava8 jacocoTestReport`
- [ ] `./gradlew prepareRelease` when release or publication flow changes

## Checklist

- [ ] public API or behavior changes are documented
- [ ] changelog updated if release-facing
- [ ] coverage gate still passes
- [ ] Java 8 compatibility preserved
